title: Windows Audit Policy Changed
description: Detects Event ID 4719, which records Windows audit policy changes that can reduce forensic visibility during an intrusion.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4719' | stats count as Changes by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -Changes
falsepositives: Expected Group Policy or security baseline rollout windows

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 4719(S) System audit policy was changed
